meta.title: Midan Alemar Contracting Co. | Saudi Arabia's Premier Construction Partner
meta.description: Leading construction and contracting company in Saudi Arabia since 2013 — civil works, infrastructure, steel erection, roads, landscape, and more.

hero.title: Building Saudi Arabia's
hero.subtitle: Your strategic construction partner since 2013. Delivering complex civil, infrastructure, steel, and landscape projects for Saudi Arabia's leading organizations.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Your Strategic Partner in Construction & Development
about.body1: Founded in 2013 with a clear vision: to be the ideal partner for every ambitious construction project in Saudi Arabia. Over more than a decade, we have established our presence through major projects ranging from NEOM to the Jubail Industrial City.
about.body2: We believe every project is a true contribution to the nation. That's why we deploy the best engineering talent and the most advanced equipment to deliver results that exceed expectations in quality, timing, and value.
highlights: Over 80 successfully completed projects across multiple sectors
Certified to ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 standards
A workforce of 338 engineers, technicians, and specialists
Modern heavy equipment fleet ensuring efficiency and speed
Established partnerships with Saudi Arabia's top companies
D-U-N-S registered with a verified credit rating (#67-269-8009)

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Comprehensive Construction Solutions
services.body: Seven specialized disciplines under one roof — engineered to the highest international standards from foundation to final handover.

civil.title: Civil Works
civil.desc: Full-scope reinforced concrete and structural works — from deep foundations and pile systems to superstructures and architectural finishes for industrial, commercial, and institutional clients.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Works
infrastructure.desc: End-to-end infrastructure development including internal road networks, utility corridors, drainage systems, potable water networks, and electrical distribution for large-scale industrial and residential projects.

finishing.title: Finishing Works
finishing.desc: Premium interior and exterior finishing services to the highest specification — flooring systems, wall cladding, ceiling systems, joinery, MEP finishing, and handover-ready fit-out for world-class developments.

steel.title: Steel Erection Works
steel.desc: Fabrication and erection of heavy structural steel systems for industrial facilities, warehouses, petrochemical plants, and special structures — executed with precision lifting equipment and certified welding teams.

roads.title: Roads & Asphalt Works
roads.desc: Full-cycle road construction and asphalt paving — from sub-base preparation and kerbing to multilayer asphalt laying, line marking, and road furniture installation for industrial zones and urban networks.

mosque.title: Mosque & Kitchen Works
mosque.desc: Specialized construction and fit-out of mosques and institutional kitchen facilities — from structural shell to full MEP, acoustic treatment, decorative Islamic finishes, and commercial kitchen equipment installation.

landscape.title: Landscape Works
landscape.desc: Creation of premium outdoor environments — soft landscaping with native and ornamental planting, hardscape elements, water features, decorative paving, pergolas, and automated irrigation for residential compounds, hotels, and public realm.

services.gridBody: From structural civil works to premium landscape design — a complete construction capability under a single roof.
services.ctaBody: Our engineering team is available to discuss your requirements and provide a detailed proposal.

neom.title: NEOM NRC26 Project
neom.desc: Premium interior and exterior finishing works within the NEOM global development — one of the most technically demanding finishing projects in the Kingdom, delivering world-class specifications across residential and hospitality units.
scope: Premium flooring and wall cladding systems
Quality assurance to NEOM's exacting standards

ksu.title: KSU Learning & Training Center
ksu.desc: Complete civil works and structural construction of the Learning & Training Center at King Saud University — a landmark facility combining advanced structural engineering with contemporary architecture.

aramco.title: Saudi Aramco — Ajyad Project
aramco.desc: Comprehensive infrastructure package for a major industrial site — covering internal road networks, utility trenching, drainage, and all external civil works to Aramco's world-class quality standards.

sipchem.title: SIPCHEM — EVA Production Unit
sipchem.desc: Erection of a complete heavy-steel industrial production facility for Sipchem's EVA unit in Jubail — including main structural steelwork, equipment platforms, pipe racks, and safety-critical secondary steel.

amwaj.title: Amwaj Half Moon Bay Resort
amwaj.desc: Full landscape and water-feature package for a five-star resort — including infinity pools, interactive fountains, ornamental planting, hardscape terraces, and automated irrigation across the entire resort grounds.

roads-network.title: Industrial Zone Road Network
roads-network.desc: Complete road network construction for a major industrial zone — from earthworks and sub-base preparation to multilayer asphalt paving, kerbing, drainage, line marking, and road signage.

mosque-complex.title: Residential Complex Mosque & Kitchen
mosque-complex.desc: Specialized construction and fit-out of a grand mosque and central kitchen facility within a large residential compound — from structural works through to decorative Islamic finishes, acoustic systems, and full commercial kitchen installation.

stats.label: Our Achievements in Numbers
stats.title: Figures That Reflect Our Market Weight

why.label: Why Midan Alemar?
why.title: Six Reasons We Are the Right Choice
why.body: We are chosen over dozens of contracting companies in the Kingdom because what we offer goes beyond project execution — we deliver a strategic partnership built on trust, competence, and results.

items.title: Internationally Certified Quality
items.desc: We operate under the ISO 9001 quality management system, meaning every construction phase is subject to rigorous oversight and documented standards.

items.title: Strict On-Time Delivery
items.desc: Our track record speaks for itself: we have never been late on any of our major projects. Precise planning is our foremost pillar.

items.title: Elite Engineering Talent
items.desc: Our team comprises 338 specialists — engineers and technicians — with experience on Saudi Arabia's and the region's most prestigious projects.

items.title: Complete Equipment Fleet
items.desc: We own a fleet of more than 150 state-of-the-art heavy units, eliminating dependence on subcontractors and ensuring full schedule control.

items.title: Full Reporting Transparency
items.desc: We provide our clients with detailed, regularly updated progress reports so you remain fully informed at every stage of your project.

items.title: Real Value for Your Investment
items.desc: We study every project carefully and propose the most cost-efficient solutions without compromising material quality or execution precision.

clients.label: Our Clients
clients.title: Trusted by Saudi Arabia's Leading Organizations
clients.body: We are proud of strong strategic partnerships with some of the most prominent Saudi and international companies operating in the Kingdom.
clients.footnote: And many more major Saudi and regional companies — over 40 clients across 12 years

cta.label: Talk to Our Team
cta.photoTitle: Start Your Project With Us Today
cta.title: Let Us Turn Your Vision Into Built Reality
cta.body: Our engineering team is ready to study your project and present a comprehensive proposal including the timeline, budget estimate, and execution phases.

footer.tagline: A leading Saudi contracting company founded in 2013. We execute construction and infrastructure projects for top organizations to the highest international quality and safety standards.
footer.address: Eastern Ring Rd, Al Ezdihar Dist., Riyadh — KSA

header.subtitle: A leading Saudi contracting company in construction and infrastructure since 2013

about.intro: We believe great construction builds a better future. Every project we execute carries the hallmark of our quality and commitment.

values.title: Quality & Excellence
values.desc: We commit to the highest quality standards across all project execution phases in line with approved international benchmarks.

values.title: Professional Team
values.desc: We bring together highly experienced engineers and specialists across all areas of construction and development.

values.title: Environmental Sustainability
values.desc: We uphold environmental standards in all our projects, affirming our responsibility to the environment and community.

values.title: Partnership & Trust
values.desc: We build long-term client partnerships based on transparency, commitment, and measurable results.

Joined NEOM projects; surpassed 80 completed projects
